Title: 10 Open-Source projects from KubeCon Project Pavillion
Author: Microsoft Developer
Description:
This episode was recorded at KubeCon Atlanta 2025 Project Pavillion. It's a group of 10 Short videos of CNCF projects. Projects are COPA, Drasi, External Secrets, Headlamp, Inspektor Gadget, K3S, KubeScape, Fluentd/FluentBit, Dapr and Flux

✅ Chapters: 00:00 Introduction 00:33 Project Pavillion Overview 01:46 Project Copacetic or COPA 04:18 External Secrets 05:31 Dapr 08:19 Drasi 13:41 K3S 15:26 Inspektor Gadget 17:15 Kubescape 20:09 Fluentd and FluentBit 24:12 Flux 30:05 Headlamp

✅ Resources: Drasi Video https://youtu.be/gR\_2MV8GJ7M?si=z0MDdLEpLaY-0exH Copacetic Video https://youtu.be/LBJFh1zfHjg?si=rFk-nAOx5pgFeR00 Inspektor Gadget https://youtu.be/efWxH4j46mk?si=SlhiPk5qAblkCRIU Headlamp https://youtu.be/0AFvS9nxFE8?si=66NjGtZ6xlMOTEMC External Secrets https://youtu.be/2FOB49oXts8?si=I1I5ontIdeQS1bna Dapr Agents https://youtu.be/VLRg4TKtLBc?si=Qosr4c8I2Gm34gzD
